property.description: Detection of excessive GTP-U traffic from UE(s) that may cause data-plane saturation or resource exhaustion.

beginning.property: <event value="COMPUTE" event_id="2" description="Sustained high traffic rate from the UE over time." boolean_expression="(gtpu.packet_rate > 5000)&&(#last(ngap.amf_ue_id) == ngap.amf_ue_id)&&(#timestamp - #last_timestamp < 60)" />
